scripts.datasets:medium: cross-env TOOL_PAGE_LIMIT=10000 COMPARE_PAGE_LIMIT=5000 ALT_PAGE_LIMIT=10000 node scripts/build-seo-datasets.mjs
scripts.datasets:full: cross-env TOOL_PAGE_LIMIT=19088 COMPARE_PAGE_LIMIT=10000 ALT_PAGE_LIMIT=19088 node scripts/build-seo-datasets.mjs
scripts.pipeline: npm run inject && npm run datasets && npm run authority
scripts.pipeline:medium: npm run inject && npm run datasets:medium && npm run authority
scripts.pipeline:full: npm run inject && npm run datasets:full && npm run authority
scripts.pipeline:taxonomy: npm run inject && npm run taxonomy
scripts.pipeline:taxonomy:medium: npm run inject && npm run taxonomy && npm run datasets:medium && npm run authority
scripts.pipeline:taxonomy:full: npm run inject && npm run taxonomy && npm run datasets:full && npm run authority
